content.full_text:
May 8, 1992


FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA  95804

Attn: Legal Division

Gentlemen:

Reference my telephone conversation with Ms. Blanca of your
office, I have the following question regarding "Surplus
Campaign Funds."

     Can "Surplus Campaign Funds" be donated to the "Senate
Republican Caucus."

Is that caucus still in existence or has it been replaced by
"Opportunity 92"? If it has been replaced, can "Surplus
Campaign Funds" be donated to it." The name makes it sound
like it is a campaign organization of some sort which would
make such donations illegal.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Carl G. Olson
CARL G. OLSON
Treasurer

CGO:eo


ELSIE OLSON & ASSOCIATES
CAMPAIGN ACCOUNTING
18309 San Fernando Mission Blvd. • Northridge, CA 91326 • (818) 360-3729

[The image appears to be a mostly blank or very faded document with minimal visible text. The top portion contains some illegible horizontal lines or text that is too faint to read clearly. The rest of the page is essentially blank white space.]

[illegible]
